homepage.heroSubline: Protect your home with durable, beautiful siding. Los Altos Construction delivers expert installation and lasting results across Southern California.
homepage.aboutTitle: Built on Quality, Rooted in Long Beach
aboutText: Los Altos Construction started with a simple goal: to provide Long Beach homeowners with top-quality siding solutions and unmatched craftsmanship. We saw the need for a reliable contractor who understood the unique challenges of our coastal climate and the diverse architectural styles of our neighborhoods, from Belmont Shore to Bixby Knolls.

Our approach is straightforward: we listen to your needs, offer honest advice, and deliver exceptional work. We believe in clear communication, meticulous attention to detail, and using only the best materials to ensure your siding stands the test of time. We tackle every project with the same dedication, from small repairs to complete home transformations.

As a Long Beach-based company, we're committed to giving back to the community that has supported us. We actively participate in local initiatives and strive to minimize our environmental impact through responsible waste management and sustainable material sourcing. Los Altos Construction is more than just a business; we're your neighbors.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: We understand Long Beach's climate and architectural styles, ensuring the perfect siding solution for your home.

valueProps.title: Premium Materials
valueProps.description: We use only the highest-quality siding products from trusted manufacturers, offering superior durability and aesthetics.

valueProps.title: Expert Installation
valueProps.description: Our skilled team of installers is trained to deliver flawless workmanship and lasting results.

valueProps.title: Transparent Pricing
valueProps.description: We provide clear, detailed estimates with no hidden fees, so you know exactly what to expect.

homepage.ctaHeadline: Ready to Upgrade Your Home's Siding?
homepage.ctaSubline: Contact Los Altos Construction today for a free consultation and discover the difference quality siding can make.

services.name: Vinyl Siding Installation
services.shortDescription: Durable, affordable, and versatile vinyl siding solutions for Long Beach homes.
services.description:
Vinyl siding is a popular choice for Long Beach homeowners seeking a cost-effective and low-maintenance siding option. At Los Altos Construction, we offer a wide variety of vinyl siding styles, colors, and textures to complement any architectural design, from classic Craftsman bungalows to modern waterfront developments. Our expert installers ensure a precise and secure fit, protecting your home from the elements and enhancing its curb appeal for years to come.

We understand the challenges posed by Long Beach's warm, dry climate and intense UV exposure. That's why we only use premium vinyl siding products that are resistant to fading, cracking, and warping. Our team will work with you to select the perfect vinyl siding to meet your aesthetic preferences and budget requirements.

From initial consultation to final inspection, Los Altos Construction is committed to providing exceptional service and complete customer satisfaction. We take pride in our workmanship and stand behind every vinyl siding installation with a comprehensive warranty.
process: Step 1: Consultation and Design – We discuss your needs and preferences, providing expert guidance on vinyl siding options.
Step 2: Precise Measurement and Material Selection – We take accurate measurements and help you choose the perfect vinyl siding color and style.
Step 3: Professional Installation – Our skilled installers ensure a flawless and weather-tight installation.
Step 4: Final Inspection and Cleanup – We conduct a thorough inspection and leave your property clean and tidy.
benefits: Low maintenance and easy to clean
Wide variety of styles and colors
Resistant to fading, cracking, and warping

faq.question: How long does vinyl siding last in Long Beach's climate?
faq.answer: With proper installation and maintenance, vinyl siding can last for 20-40 years in Long Beach's climate. Our premium vinyl siding products are specifically designed to withstand the challenges of our warm, dry climate and intense UV exposure.

faq.question: Is vinyl siding environmentally friendly?
faq.answer: Vinyl siding is a recyclable material, and many manufacturers are now using recycled content in their products. It also helps to improve energy efficiency by providing an extra layer of insulation for your home.

faq.question: How much does vinyl siding installation cost?
faq.answer: The cost of vinyl siding installation varies depending on the size of your home, the type of vinyl siding you choose, and the complexity of the project. Contact us for a free, no-obligation estimate.

services.name: Fiber Cement Siding Installation
services.shortDescription: Durable and fire-resistant fiber cement siding for enduring beauty and protection.
services.description:
Fiber cement siding is an increasingly popular choice for Long Beach homeowners seeking exceptional durability, fire resistance, and aesthetic versatility. Los Altos Construction specializes in the expert installation of fiber cement siding, offering a wide range of styles and textures to complement any architectural design, from classic Craftsman homes to modern residences.

Fiber cement siding is particularly well-suited to Long Beach's climate, providing superior protection against fire, moisture, and pests. It's also resistant to warping, cracking, and fading, ensuring lasting beauty and value for your home. Our skilled installers are trained to handle fiber cement siding with precision and care, ensuring a seamless and weather-tight installation.

We partner with leading fiber cement siding manufacturers to offer a wide selection of colors, styles, and textures, including options that mimic the look of wood, stucco, and brick. Our team will work with you to design a siding solution that perfectly complements your home's architecture and enhances its curb appeal.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation – We help you choose the perfect fiber cement siding style and color for your home.
Step 2: Precise Cutting and Fitting – Our skilled installers cut and fit the fiber cement siding with meticulous attention to detail.
Step 3: Secure Installation – We use specialized fasteners to ensure a secure and weather-tight installation.
Step 4: Painting and Finishing – We apply high-quality paint to protect the fiber cement siding and enhance its beauty.
benefits: Wide range of styles and textures

faq.question: Is fiber cement siding a good choice for earthquake-prone areas like Long Beach?
faq.answer: Yes, fiber cement siding is a durable and resilient material that can withstand seismic activity better than some other siding options. Its inherent strength and proper installation contribute to its ability to resist damage from earthquakes.

faq.question: Does fiber cement siding require special maintenance?
faq.answer: Fiber cement siding requires minimal maintenance. It's resistant to rot, pests, and fire, and it can be easily cleaned with a garden hose and mild detergent. Periodic painting or sealing may be required to maintain its appearance and protect it from the elements.

faq.question: What is the lifespan of fiber cement siding?
faq.answer: With proper installation and maintenance, fiber cement siding can last for 50 years or more. Its durability and resistance to the elements make it a long-lasting and cost-effective siding option.

services.name: Wood Siding Installation
services.shortDescription: Timeless beauty and natural warmth with expertly installed wood siding.
services.description:
For homeowners seeking a classic and elegant look, wood siding offers unparalleled beauty and natural warmth. Los Altos Construction specializes in the installation of wood siding, providing expert craftsmanship and attention to detail to ensure a lasting and beautiful finish. We offer a variety of wood siding options, including cedar, redwood, and pine, each with its unique characteristics and aesthetic appeal.

We understand the importance of proper installation and maintenance to protect wood siding from the elements. Our skilled installers use proven techniques to ensure a weather-tight and durable installation, preventing moisture damage and prolonging the life of your siding. We also offer expert advice on painting, staining, and sealing to maintain the beauty and integrity of your wood siding for years to come.

Wood siding requires more maintenance than other siding options, but the natural beauty and warmth it provides are well worth the effort. Los Altos Construction is committed to providing exceptional service and guidance to help you protect and preserve your wood siding for generations to come.
process: Step 1: Wood Selection – We help you choose the perfect wood species and style for your home.
Step 2: Precise Cutting and Fitting – Our skilled installers cut and fit the wood siding with meticulous attention to detail.
Step 3: Proper Nailing and Fastening – We use the correct fasteners to ensure a secure and lasting installation.
Step 4: Priming and Painting/Staining – We properly prime and paint or stain the wood siding to protect it from the elements.
benefits: Can be painted or stained to match any color scheme

faq.question: What type of wood siding is best for Long Beach's climate?
faq.answer: Cedar and redwood are excellent choices for Long Beach's climate due to their natural resistance to moisture, decay, and insects. They also hold paint and stain well, providing long-lasting protection and beauty.

faq.question: How often should wood siding be painted or stained?
faq.answer: Wood siding should be painted or stained every 3-5 years, depending on the exposure to the elements. Regular maintenance will help to protect the wood from moisture damage and prolong its lifespan.

faq.question: What are the signs that wood siding needs to be replaced?
faq.answer: Signs that wood siding needs to be replaced include rot, decay, insect infestation, warping, cracking, and peeling paint or stain.

services.name: Siding Repair Services
services.shortDescription: Expert siding repair to fix damage and restore your home's protection.
services.description:
Even the most durable siding can sustain damage over time due to weather, pests, or accidents. Los Altos Construction offers comprehensive siding repair services to address any issue, from minor cracks and dents to extensive rot and decay. We understand the importance of prompt and effective siding repair to protect your home from further damage and maintain its curb appeal.

Our skilled technicians are experienced in repairing all types of siding, including vinyl, fiber cement, wood, and metal. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a seamless and lasting repair. Whether you need a single panel replaced or a complete section of siding restored, we have the expertise to get the job done right.

We offer free inspections and estimates for all siding repair projects. Our team will assess the damage, provide a detailed repair plan, and offer transparent pricing. We're committed to providing exceptional service and complete customer satisfaction.
process: Step 1: Thorough Inspection – We carefully assess the damage to your siding.
Step 2: Precise Matching – We find the closest match to your existing siding material and color.
Step 3: Expert Repair or Replacement – We expertly repair or replace damaged siding panels.
Step 4: Seamless Finishing – We ensure a seamless and weather-tight finish.
benefits: Prevents further damage to your home
Extends the life of your siding

faq.question: How do I know if my siding needs to be repaired?
faq.answer: Signs that your siding needs to be repaired include cracks, dents, holes, rot, decay, loose panels, and peeling paint.

faq.question: Can you repair siding that has been damaged by termites?
faq.answer: Yes, we can repair siding that has been damaged by termites. We will remove the damaged siding, treat the area for termites, and install new siding to protect your home.

faq.question: How much does siding repair cost?
faq.answer: The cost of siding repair varies depending on the extent of the damage, the type of siding, and the complexity of the project. Contact us for a free estimate.

services.name: Complete Siding Replacement
services.shortDescription: Transform your home with a complete siding replacement for enhanced beauty and protection.
services.description:
When siding is severely damaged or outdated, a complete siding replacement may be the best option. Los Altos Construction offers comprehensive siding replacement services, providing expert guidance and craftsmanship to transform your home's appearance and protect it from the elements. We offer a wide variety of siding options, including vinyl, fiber cement, wood, and metal, to suit any architectural style and budget.

Our team will work with you to select the perfect siding to meet your aesthetic preferences and performance requirements. We handle every aspect of the siding replacement process, from removing the old siding to installing the new siding with precision and care. We also ensure proper insulation and weatherproofing to improve your home's energy efficiency and protect it from moisture damage.

Los Altos Construction is committed to providing exceptional service and complete customer satisfaction. We offer free consultations and estimates for all siding replacement projects. Our team will assess your needs, provide a detailed proposal, and answer any questions you may have.
process: Step 1: Consultation and Design – We discuss your needs and preferences, providing expert guidance on siding options.
Step 2: Removal of Old Siding – We safely and efficiently remove your old siding.
Step 3: Installation of New Siding – Our skilled installers ensure a flawless and weather-tight installation.
Step 4: Final Inspection and Cleanup – We conduct a thorough inspection and leave your property clean and tidy.
benefits: Protects your home from the elements

faq.question: How long does siding replacement take?
faq.answer: The duration of a siding replacement project depends on the size of your home, the type of siding being installed, and the complexity of the project. We will provide you with a timeline during the consultation process.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for siding replacement?
faq.answer: In most cases, you will need a permit for siding replacement. We can assist you with the permit application process.

faq.question: Will siding replacement disrupt my daily life?
faq.answer: We will do our best to minimize disruption to your daily life during the siding replacement process. We will work efficiently and keep the job site clean and organized.

services.name: Commercial Siding Services
services.shortDescription: Durable and professional siding solutions for commercial buildings in Long Beach.
services.description:
Los Altos Construction provides expert commercial siding services for businesses throughout Long Beach and the surrounding areas. We understand the unique needs of commercial properties and offer a wide range of siding options to enhance the appearance, durability, and energy efficiency of your building. From retail storefronts to office buildings, we have the expertise to deliver exceptional results.

We offer a variety of commercial siding options, including metal, fiber cement, and vinyl, each with its own advantages in terms of durability, aesthetics, and cost-effectiveness. Our team will work with you to select the perfect siding to meet your specific needs and budget. We also offer expert installation services, ensuring a seamless and professional finish.

Los Altos Construction is committed to providing exceptional service and complete customer satisfaction. We understand the importance of minimizing disruption to your business operations and will work efficiently to complete your siding project on time and within budget.
process: Step 1: Consultation and Planning – We discuss your needs and develop a customized siding solution.
Step 2: Material Selection – We help you choose the best siding material for your commercial building.
Step 3: Professional Installation – Our experienced team ensures a precise and durable installation.
Step 4: Project Completion – We conduct a final inspection and ensure your complete satisfaction.
benefits: Enhances the appearance of your commercial building

faq.question: What types of commercial buildings do you provide siding services for?
faq.answer: We provide siding services for a wide range of commercial buildings, including retail stores, office buildings, restaurants, warehouses, and more.

faq.question: How long does commercial siding installation take?
faq.answer: The duration of commercial siding installation depends on the size and complexity of the project. We will provide you with a timeline during the consultation process.

faq.question: Do you offer warranties on commercial siding installations?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer comprehensive warranties on all of our commercial siding installations. Contact us for details.

serviceAreas.content:
Los Altos Construction is proud to offer our expert siding installation services to the residents of Los Angeles. With a rich architectural history dating back to the 1920s, particularly the prevalence of Spanish Colonial Revival style homes, Los Angeles requires a siding contractor with a keen eye for detail and respect for historical aesthetics. We understand the unique challenges and opportunities presented by these classic homes, ensuring that any new siding complements the existing character and enhances the overall curb appeal. We're also experienced with modern homes and can provide siding services for those properties as well. 

Our team is well-versed in the specific needs of Los Angeles homeowners, from navigating local building codes to selecting materials that can withstand the warm, dry climate. We are committed to providing durable, beautiful, and energy-efficient siding solutions that protect your home and increase its value. We source our materials from trusted suppliers and guarantee high-quality workmanship.
serviceAreas.localContext: Los Angeles' architectural landscape is defined by its 1920s Spanish Colonial Revival style and enjoys a warm, dry climate year-round.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Los Altos Construction did an amazing job installing new vinyl siding on my Long Beach home. The crew was professional, efficient, and meticulous. My house looks brand new, and I've already received compliments from my neighbors. Great price, great service!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: I had some storm damage to my fiber cement siding, and Los Altos Construction came out quickly to assess the damage and provide a repair quote. They were able to match the existing siding perfectly, and the repair is seamless. Highly recommend their siding repair services!

reviews.name: Jennifer L.
reviews.text: We chose Los Altos Construction to install wood siding on our Craftsman bungalow in Belmont Shore. They did an excellent job with the installation, and the wood siding looks beautiful. The team was very knowledgeable and helpful throughout the entire process.

reviews.name: Robert B.
reviews.text: After getting several quotes, we decided to go with Los Altos Construction for our complete siding replacement project. They offered a competitive price and a clear timeline. The crew was professional and courteous, and they completed the project on time and within budget. Our home looks fantastic!

reviews.name: Susan M.
reviews.text: Los Altos Construction installed new siding on our retail building in Long Beach. They were very responsive to our needs and provided a high-quality installation. We are very happy with the results.

reviews.name: Michael P.
reviews.text: Fast, reliable, and fairly priced. Los Altos Construction fixed the damaged siding on my house after a tree fell on it. They were able to match the color perfectly and you can't even tell there was any damage. I would definitely use them again.
